textByHash.5460dc98977c5b0cfca03a3a5d79b4645c974bed: At last Baxtorian calls to me. I can't say I expected him to send a human, but I suppose nothing is as expected these days.
textByHash.2cbf08b548743eb18620fa4381c027dfd8f07826: I will join you in this darkest of hours. Where must I go?
textByHash.4a1e56a5466e7607cdaf9e5df87f6c09f8b35c2b: I've been on the run from Lord Iorwerth for centuries. I'll be glad to finally see peace.
textByHash.235648fd27e5298e4a13ff728905104b969c9cc9: Don't forget that death is a form of peace.
textByHash.8ca68dd35d7bfaa44aa9b39befb873d867800055: There are worse things in this world than death. Never forget that.
textByHash.66812730c5e6a2706cb613ac6261f21bf1644540: Good to see you again . Have you come to marvel at the beauty of Prifddinas?
textByHash.39a9f8a851fd2ede92775fd8f703356e979387d6: Indeed it is. I love exploring, seeking out the hidden secrets of this world. But nothing will ever compare to this place, to our home.
textByHash.70b45c372f5097e5bd9a3c3b938c2916ab2ad9fe: And we are very privileged to have you here.
